title: campanula stricta
intro: Campanula stricta, also known as Tussock Bellflower, is a perennial plant species native to North America, characterized by its tall spikes of blue or purple flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Campanula stricta include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe sore throats, and ease congestion. Campanula stricta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate cold symptoms.
